---
title: "Assignment 6"
author: "Kaodinna Onwumechili"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
suppressWarnings({
  library(DBI)
  library(duckdb)
  library(nycflights13)
  library(dbplyr)
})
```

## Part I: Answer the following question by running SQL using RStudio.

#### a. List the first 10 rows of the `flights` table.

```{r}
dbconn <- dbConnect(duckdb())
dbWriteTable(dbconn, "flights", flights)
```

```{r}
dbGetQuery(
  dbconn,
  # select all columns
  # from flights
  # only first 10 rows
  "SELECT *
  FROM flights
  LIMIT 10;"
)
```

#### b. Find the **number of flights**

###### i. in the dataset

```{r}
dbGetQuery(dbconn, "SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_flights FROM flights")
```
